react.title: Real-time Chat App
react.desc: Build a chat app using React, WebSocket, and a backend of your choice. Include typing indicators and read receipts.

react.title: E-commerce Dashboard
react.desc: Create a merchant dashboard with charts, data grids, and state management using Redux or Zustand.

node.js.title: RESTful Task API
node.js.desc: Build an API with JWT auth, rate limiting, and MongoDB integration. Document with Swagger.

node.js.title: Real-time Notifications Service
node.js.desc: Microservice handling email and push notifications using RabbitMQ and Node.js.

python.title: Data Scraper & Analyzer
python.desc: Scrape financial data, clean it with Pandas, and visualize trends over time.

python.title: Automated Trading Bot
python.desc: Connect to a crypto API and implement a simple moving average crossover strategy.

machine learning.title: Customer Churn Predictor
machine learning.desc: Train a Random Forest model on a telecom dataset to predict which users will cancel their subscription.

machine learning.title: Image Classifier API
machine learning.desc: Use a pre-trained ResNet model and wrap it in a FastAPI endpoint for uploading images.

aws.title: Serverless Image Resizer
aws.desc: Upload image to S3 -> Trigger Lambda -> Resize -> Save to new bucket.

aws.title: Highly Available Web App
aws.desc: Deploy an app across 2 AZs with an Application Load Balancer and Auto Scaling Group.

docker.title: Multi-container Environment
docker.desc: Dockerize a frontend, backend, and database. Connect them using Docker Compose and custom networks.

sql.title: E-commerce Schema Design
sql.desc: Design a 3NF normalized database schema for a store including users, orders, products, and reviews. Write complex join queries.
